headline: Giants of Cancer Care® announces the 14th annual class of inductees
summary: CRANBURY, N.J., May 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- OncLive®, the nation’s leading multimedia resource for oncology professionals and Pfizer (platinum supporter), Daiichi-Sankyo (platinum supporter) and Regeneron (silver supporter), proudly announces the inductees of the 14th Annual Giants of Cancer Care recognition program.
